page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: BSCI105 or BSCI170.

Formerly: BSCI105.

BSCI171 Principles of Molecular & Cellular Biology Laboratory (1 Credit) Basic laboratory principles of biology with special emphasis on cellular and molecular biology.

Prerequisite: Must have math eligibility of MATH120 or higher. Corequisite: BSCI170.
